sentences.target: On suit une formation interne demain.

translations.fr: On suit une formation interne demain.
translations.en: We’re taking an internal training tomorrow.
translations.de: Morgen haben wir eine interne Schulung.
translations.ru: Завтра у нас будет внутреннее обучение.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi có buổi đào tạo nội bộ.
translations.nl: Morgen hebben we een interne training.
translations.uk: Завтра у нас буде внутрішнє навчання.
translations.nb: I morgen har vi intern opplæring.
translations.da: I morgen har vi et internt kursus.
translations.ja: 明日は社内研修があります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular, generic 'one' or colloquial 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introduces 'formation'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'suit'.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'formation'.
Temporal adverb indicating time.

sentences.target: Tu as fini la formation en ligne.
sentences.reading: /ty a fi.ni la fɔʁ.ma.sjɔ̃ ɑ̃ liɲ/

translations.fr: Tu as fini la formation en ligne.
translations.ipa: /ty a fi.ni la fɔʁ.ma.sjɔ̃ ɑ̃ liɲ/
translations.en: Have you finished the online training?
translations.vi: Bạn đã hoàn thành khóa đào tạo trực tuyến chưa?
translations.nl: Heb je de online training afgerond?
translations.hi: क्या आपने ऑनलाइन प्रशिक्षण पूरा कर लिया है?
translations.id: Apakah kamu sudah menyelesaikan pelatihan online?
translations.ja: オンライン研修はもう終わりましたか。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular informal.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; forms the passé composé.
Past participle of 'finir'; main lexical verb in the compound tense.
Definite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'fini'.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase 'en ligne'.
Common noun, feminine singular; with 'en' forms the fixed expression 'en ligne' (online).

sentences.target: Ma formation est surtout en comptabilité.

translations.fr: Ma formation est surtout en comptabilité.
translations.en: My training is mainly in accounting.
translations.es: Mi formación es principalmente en contabilidad.
translations.de: Meine Ausbildung ist hauptsächlich im Rechnungswesen.
translations.it: La mia formazione è principalmente in contabilità.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的培训主要在会计方面。
translations.yue: 我嘅培訓主要係會計方面。
translations.ru: Моя подготовка в основном по бухгалтерскому учёту.
translations.pt: Minha formação é principalmente em contabilidade.
translations.vi: Tôi được đào tạo chủ yếu về kế toán.
translations.nl: Mijn opleiding is vooral in de boekhouding.
translations.uk: Моє навчання переважно з бухгалтерського обліку.
translations.hu: A képzésem főként számvitel területén van.
translations.hi: मेरा प्रशिक्षण मुख्यतः लेखांकन में है.
translations.pl: Moje wykształcenie jest głównie w rachunkowości.
translations.el: Η κατάρτισή μου είναι κυρίως στη λογιστική.
translations.nb: Opplæringen min er hovedsakelig innen regnskap.
translations.id: Pelatihan saya terutama di bidang akuntansi.
translations.sv: Min utbildning är främst inom redovisning.
translations.ro: Pregătirea mea este în principal în contabilitate.
translations.cs: Moje vzdělání je hlavně v účetnictví.
translations.da: Min uddannelse er primært inden for regnskab.
translations.ja: 私の研修は主に会計分野です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'formation'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'est'.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate.
Adverb meaning 'mostly/above all'; modifies the following prepositional phrase.
Preposition introducing a field/domain.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'en'.

sentences.target: Je veux une formation courte et pratique.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø yn fɔʁ.ma.sjɔ̃ kuʁt e pʁa.tik/

translations.fr: Je veux une formation courte et pratique.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø yn fɔʁ.ma.sjɔ̃ kuʁt e pʁa.tik/
translations.en: I want a short, practical training.
translations.es: Quiero una formación corta y práctica.
translations.de: Ich möchte eine kurze, praxisnahe Schulung.
translations.it: Voglio una formazione breve e pratica.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想要一个短而实用的培训。
translations.yue: 我想要一個短而實用嘅培訓。
translations.ru: Я хочу короткое и практическое обучение.
translations.pt: Quero um treinamento curto e prático.
translations.tr: Kısa ve pratik bir eğitim istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn một khóa đào tạo ngắn và thực tế.
translations.nl: Ik wil een korte en praktische training.
translations.uk: Я хочу коротке й практичне навчання.
translations.hi: मैं एक छोटा और व्यावहारिक प्रशिक्षण चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω μια σύντομη και πρακτική εκπαίδευση.
translations.nb: Jeg vil ha et kort og praktisk kurs.
translations.id: Saya ingin pelatihan yang singkat dan praktis.
translations.sv: Jag vill ha en kort och praktisk utbildning.
translations.ro: Vreau o instruire scurtă și practică.
translations.da: Jeg vil have et kort og praktisk kursus.
translations.ja: 短くて実践的な研修がほしいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces 'formation'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'veux'.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'formation'.
Coordinating conjunction linking adjectives.
Adjective, singular form (same spelling for masculine and feminine); coordinated with 'courte' to modify 'formation'.
